name: capybara_game
description: Capybara Game template visit https://developer.capybara.build to learn more

scripts.dev: tsx scripts/normalize-index.ts && npm run build:css && tsx scripts/build-css.ts --watch & esbuild src/main.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=browser --target=es2022 --minify --legal-comments=none --outfile=dist/main.js --watch
scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run bundle
scripts.build:watch: npm run typecheck:watch & npm run bundle:watch

author: Capybara Game Team
